zh.lifeSummary: 當Iorwerth Voel ap Iorwerth Fychan於大約1251年出生在英國威爾斯丹比爾利朗勒朋維時，他的父親Iorwerth Fychan ab Iorwerth Gam52歲，母親Catrin ferch Gruffydd19歲。他和Gladys verch Iorwerth至少有8個兒子。他去世於1313年在英國威爾斯丹比爾利朗勒利朗勒享年63歲。

nameMeanings.name: ap
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Dutch: from a short form of the personal name Adelhard, which is of ancient Germanic origin, composed of the elements adal ‘noble’ + hard ‘bold, hardy’. Compare Ale and Alma 4.

variants.name: Ale
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Carlos Enrique, Cesar, Jose, Maria De Jesus.
Italian (Sicily; Alé): probably a variant of Aleo .

nameMeanings.name: Fychan
meanings: Welsh: A Welsh name of great antiquity, from vyckan, little, small; i.e. small in stature. Compare the surname Bychan and the Armoric Le Bihan.

nameMeanings.name: Iorwerth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Traditional: from iōr‘ ‘lord’ + a mutated form of berth ‘handsome’; borne in the Mabinogi by the jealous brother of Madawg , son of Maredudd . Iorwerth came to be regarded as a Welsh equivalent of Edward , but it has no actual connection with that name.

variants.name: Yorath
meanings: Anglicized form of   Iorwerth   or, in some cases, a transferred use of the surname derived from it.

nameMeanings.name: Voel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Biblical name, composed of two different Hebrew elements, Yah(weh) and El, both of which mean ‘God’ the implication of the name is that the Hebrew God, Yahweh, is the only true god. This is a common name in the Bible, being borne by, among others, one of King David's ‘mighty men’ (1 Chronicles 11:38), and a minor prophet who lived in the 8th century bc . The name has been perennially popular as a Jewish name; it was also taken up by the Puritans and other Christian fundamentalists. The name has long been in regular use in North America but was uncommon in Britain until the 1990s. Well-known bearers of the name include the American singer and entertainer Joel Grey ( b. 1932 ), the West Indian cricketer Joel Garner ( b. 1952 ), and the American film director Joel Coen ( b. 1954 ). The French form Joël is also used in the English-speaking world.

en.lifeSummary: When Iorwerth Voel ap Iorwerth Fychan was born about 1251, in Pengwern, Llangollen, Denbighshire, Wales, United Kingdom, his father, Iorwerth Fychan ab Iorwerth Gam, was 52 and his mother, Catrin ferch Gruffydd, was 19. He had at least 8 sons with Gladys verch Iorwerth. He died in 1313, in Llangollen, Llangollen, Denbighshire, Wales, United Kingdom, at the age of 63.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Iorwerth Voel ap Iorwerth Fychan est né environ 1251, à Pengwern, Llangollen, Denbighshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni, son père, Iorwerth Fychan ab Iorwerth Gam, avait 52 ans et sa mère, Catrin ferch Gruffydd, avait 19 ans. ja.lifeSummary: Iorwerth Voel ap Iorwerth Fychanが約1251年にイギリスウェールズデンビグhシュアイアランゴレンペングウエルンで生まれた時，父Iorwerth Fychan ab Iorwerth Gamは52歳，母Catrin ferch Gruffyddは19歳であった。彼はGladys verch Iorwerthとの間に少なくとも8人の息子をもうけた。彼は1313年にイギリスウェールズデンビグhシュアイアランゴレンランゴレンで63歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Iorwerth Voel ap Iorwerth Fychan(이)가 대략 1251년 영국 웨일스 덴비그h실르 랭렌 펜그워에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Iorwerth Fychan ab Iorwerth Gam(은)는 52세였고, 그의 어머니 Catrin ferch Gruffydd(은)는 19세였다. 그는 Gladys verch Iorwerth(와)과 적어도 여덟 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1313년 영국 웨일스 덴비그h실르 랭렌 랭렌에서 63세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Iorwerth Voel ap Iorwerth Fychan nasceu aproximadamente 1251, em Pengwern, Llangollen, Denbighshire, Gales, United Kingdom, seu pai, Iorwerth Fychan ab Iorwerth Gam, tinha 52 anos e sua mãe, Catrin ferch Gruffydd, tinha 19 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 8 filhos com Gladys verch Iorwerth. Ele faleceu em 1313, em Llangollen, Llangollen, Denbighshire, Gales, United Kingdom, com 63 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Iorwerth Voel ap Iorwerth Fychan родился около 1251 г. в местности пэнгвирн, лланголлен, денбаишир, Уэльс, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Iorwerth Fychan ab Iorwerth Gam было 52 года, а матери, которую звали Catrin ferch Gruffydd, 19. У него было по крайней мере 8 сыновей от Gladys verch Iorwerth. Он умер в 1313 г. в местности лланголлен, лланголлен, денбаишир, Уэльс, Великобритания в возрасте 63 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Iorwerth Voel ap Iorwerth Fychan nació aproximadamente 1251, en Pengwern, Llangollen, Denbighshire, Gales, Reino Unido, su papá, Iorwerth Fychan ab Iorwerth Gam, tenía 52 años y su mamá, Catrin ferch Gruffydd, tenía 19 años. Tuvo por lo menos 8 hijos con Gladys verch Iorwerth. Murió en 1313, en Llangollen, Llangollen, Denbighshire, Gales, Reino Unido, a la edad de 63 años.
